title: Mosaic Paywall Protocol 0.2 RC4
description: The platform-neutral Mosaic native-paywall document contract for design tokens, visual effects, media backgrounds, two-axis sizing, screen and sheet presentation, generalized content, actions, and authored product-card states.

angle.description: Physical canvas direction from the first stop to the last: 0 degrees is left-to-right, 90 degrees is top-to-bottom, angles increase clockwise, and RTL never mirrors the angle.
